name: Ovulation Calculator
seo_description: Use our free ovulation calculator to quickly estimate ovulation, fertile_start based on lmp, cycle. No registration needed.
result_context: The ovulation ocurre ~14 days antes of the próximo period; The ventana fértil includes 5 days antes.
formula_display: Ovulación = última menstruación + (days cycle - 14); Ventana fértil = ovulation ± 5 days
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que lmp estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online ovulation calculator. Enter last menstrual period and cycle length to get instant results.
